title: Final Product Completion Gate validator and contract

review_policy.note: Per user instruction, full Claude review execution is skipped going forward and must not be counted as a valid review receipt.

tuw_evidence.title: Design final-product-completion-gate contract

commands.purpose: Contract JSON parse check

commands.command: node - <<'NODE' ... compare Section 8 bullet count, contract item count, forbidden literal totals, and scope revision input ... NODE
commands.purpose: Section 8 one-to-one mapping and no hardcoded total check
Launch TUW workbook ledger integrity check

notes: The contract encodes all 13 Section 8 completion items as FPCG-01 through FPCG-13.
Unit totals are represented as source-ledger references and runtime derivation rules, not literal total values.
Scope revision input path is now part of the contract so T02 can fail closed if the approved record is missing.
This TUW is not the LT-L0-W01 terminal item; WP-level G1 evidence assembly remains pending until LT-L0-W01-T05.

tuw_evidence.title: Implement final completion gate validator core

commands.purpose: Validator syntax check

commands.command: if grep -nE '55256|54355|901' scripts/validate-final-product-completion-gate.mjs; then exit 1; else echo 'no_forbidden_total_literals=ok'; fi
commands.purpose: Confirm validator source derives totals instead of hardcoding them
Scope revision baseline register JSON parse check
Run final product completion gate validator core
Verify deterministic validator output over two consecutive runs

notes: The validator loads ledger paths and the scope revision path from the contract.
The validator reports closeout_plan_completion as the production_ready count source when the closeout plan and queue are complete and the latest live pack is production_ready.
The scope revision register records no scope delta after CP closeout; future scope deltas require separate approved revisions.
Full Claude review remains waived by user instruction and is not counted as valid review evidence.

tuw_evidence.title: Extend validator for invariants and closeout pack gate-chain evidence

commands.purpose: Validator syntax check after T03 extension

commands.command: if grep -nE '55256|54355|901' scripts/validate-final-product-completion-gate.mjs; then exit 1; else echo 'no_forbidden_total_literals=ok'; fi
commands.purpose: Confirm T03 extension did not hardcode unit totals
Run final gate validator with T03 invariant and gate-chain checks
Reconcile validator pack_count with closeout pack directory count
Verify deterministic validator output after T03 extension
Launch TUW workbook ledger integrity check

notes: The validator now emits one row each for matter-first, permission-first, audit-first, evidence-bound AI, human review, read-only default, external-share safety, and vendor-neutral architecture.
The validator scans every closeout pack directory and reports missing pack gate-chain evidence as an explicit list.
The 35 review waivers are kept separate from 952 valid reviews and are not counted as valid review evidence.

tuw_evidence.title: Write manual checklist for non-machine final gate items

commands.command: node - <<'NODE' ... compare contract manual ids with checklist rows and required fields ... NODE
commands.purpose: Verify checklist set equals contract manual item set and required fields are present

commands.output: FPCG-11, FPCG-12, and FPCG-13 rows present
commands.purpose: Show the checklist contains only manual Final Product Completion Gate items
Launch TUW workbook ledger integrity check

notes: The checklist remains pending_human_acceptance; no human signature or manual approval is synthesized.
Machine-classified items remain in the validator and are intentionally absent from the manual checklist.

tuw_evidence.title: Run completion judgment and assemble G1 evidence

commands.purpose: Record official final gate machine judgment

commands.command: node - <<'NODE' ... extract markdown path links from docs/launch/g1-completion-evidence-index.md and check fs.existsSync ... NODE
commands.purpose: Verify G1 evidence index file links resolve

commands.output: Manual checklist and G1 evidence index still show pending_human_acceptance.
commands.purpose: Confirm manual gate is not falsely closed

blocking_condition.reason: FPCG-11, FPCG-12, and FPCG-13 require real human judgment/signature. Codex must not synthesize manual acceptance.
required_to_unblock: A designated human approver records decisions for FPCG-11, FPCG-12, and FPCG-13 in docs/launch/final-gate-manual-checklist.md.
After signature, rerun npm run final-product-completion-gate:validate and link verification, then update docs/launch/g1-completion-evidence-index.md from blocked_pending_human_acceptance to closed.

notes: G1 machine evidence is ready and passing.
G1 is not closed because the manual checklist is unsigned.
No manual acceptance, final SaaS-grade product candidate approval, or human signature was synthesized.

blocked_claims: This record does not close LT-L0-W01.
This record does not synthesize FPCG-11, FPCG-12, or FPCG-13 manual acceptance.
This record does not claim G1 is closed.
This record does not treat the user review waiver as valid review evidence.
